# Nick's Tire & Auto
> Cleveland's highest-rated independent auto repair shop. 1,688+ Google reviews at 4.9 stars. Located at 17625 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH 44112. Open 7 days a week. Full-service tire shop and auto repair with $0-down financing.

## Services
- [Tires](https://nickstire.org/tires): New and used tires, mounting, balancing, rotation, TPMS, flat repair. Online tire ordering with free installation.
- [Brakes](https://nickstire.org/brakes): Pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, ABS diagnostics.
- [Oil Change](https://nickstire.org/oil-change): Conventional and synthetic oil changes.
- [Diagnostics](https://nickstire.org/diagnostics): Check engine light, OBD-II scanning, computer diagnostics.
- [Emissions](https://nickstire.org/emissions): Ohio E-Check testing and emissions repair.
- [AC Repair](https://nickstire.org/ac-repair): Auto air conditioning service and repair.
- [Suspension](https://nickstire.org/suspension-repair): Shocks, struts, alignment, steering repair.
- [Transmission](https://nickstire.org/transmission): Transmission service and repair.
- [General Repair](https://nickstire.org/general-repair): Engine, electrical, exhaust, cooling, belts, hoses.

## Key Info
- Phone: (216) 862-0005
- Hours: Mon-Sat 8AM-6PM, Sun 9AM-4PM
- Financing: $0 down, instant approval through Sunbit, Koalafi, Snap Finance, Acima
- AI Diagnostic Tool: https://nickstire.org/diagnose
- Reviews: https://nickstire.org/reviews
